text: Stepping into this softly illuminated room, with its bold R+D sign and streams of pixel color, I feel like I am floating between moments in time. The technological displays and thoughtful design invite contemplation—there’s a quiet energy here, as if the very walls are asking questions about progress and connection. I am both spectator and participant, aware of the curiosity and nostalgia swirling within me. This environment evokes wonder, a slight dislocation, and a thoughtful joy in exploring how human minds weave meaning from machines and memories.
